memes.label: "Uncopyright"
memes.description: "Uncopyright — Dodsworth by Sinclair Lewis"

memes.label: A. B. Hurd
memes.description: Manager of the London agency of the Revelation Automobile Company, an American expatriate whose rough-edged competence contrasts with Fran Dodsworth's European aspirations.

memes.label: Alec Kynance
memes.description: The president of the Unit Automotive Company — the man whose corporate consolidation triggers Sam's existential crisis by absorbing the Revelation Motor Company

memes.label: American Expatriates in Paris
memes.description: The community of Americans living in Paris — expatriates who have chosen Europe over America, whose hunger for American news coexists with their determination never to return, and who represent one possible future for the traveling Dodsworths

memes.label: American Identity
memes.description: The tension between American and European cultural values as embodied by Sam Dodsworth — his Midwestern practicality, democratic instincts, and business-mindedness set against Old World sophistication

memes.label: Arnold Israel
memes.description: A cultivated European friend of Fran's — an intellectual who represents the cultural sophistication she craves and her growing distance from Sam's Midwestern world

memes.label: Atlantic Crossing
memes.description: The Dodsworths' transatlantic voyage aboard the SS Ultima — the threshold journey during which Sam discovers seafaring and solitude while Fran discovers shipboard society, establishing the dynamics of their European life

memes.label: Atlantic Ocean
memes.description: The vast body of water the Dodsworths cross aboard the SS Ultima — the Atlantic Ocean is the novel's great natural threshold, the physical separation between the American life Sam leaves and the European life he discovers

memes.label: The Automobile in Dodsworth
memes.description: The automobile serves as the novel's central symbol of American industrial ambition and the identity it confers — Sam Dodsworth builds cars, and when he stops building them, he must discover who he is without them

memes.label: Beauty and Aesthetics
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's aesthetic awakening — his gradual discovery of European art, architecture, and landscape as sources of genuine value beyond the industrial metric of utility

memes.label: Berlin
memes.description: The German capital where Fran pursues Kurt von Obersdorf — Berlin is the setting for the novel's marital crisis and the culmination of Fran's European social ambition

memes.label: Berlin Marital Crisis
memes.description: The event in Berlin when Fran Dodsworth declares her intention to leave Sam for Kurt von Obersdorf — the crisis the entire novel has been building toward, and the moment that liberates Sam to imagine a life beyond his marriage

memes.label: Brent Dodsworth
memes.description: The son of Sam and Fran Dodsworth, a Yale undergraduate whose self-confident independence mirrors Emily's and deepens Sam's sense of being rendered obsolete by the next generation

memes.label: Broughton Hall
memes.description: The English country estate of Lord Herndon where Sam confronts the British aristocracy on its own ground — Broughton Hall represents the Old World order that both impresses and alienates the American visitor

memes.label: Centaur State Bank
memes.description: The Zenith bank of which Tub Pearson is president — the Centaur State Bank represents the financial establishment of Midwestern America and the institutional world that forms Sam Dodsworth's social circle

memes.label: Countess of Baliol
memes.description: An English countess encountered in the European social scenes — a minor representative of the titled aristocracy that fascinates Fran and leaves Sam bemused

memes.label: Country House Weekend
memes.description: The weekend party at Lord Herndon's English country estate — Sam Dodsworth's most concentrated encounter with the British aristocracy, where he confronts a world that both impresses and alienates him

memes.label: De Pénable Circle
memes.description: The Paris social circle centered on Renée de Pénable — the sophisticated European salon that Fran Dodsworth aspires to join and that Sam Dodsworth can neither enter nor understand

memes.label: Departure from Zenith
memes.description: The Dodsworths' departure from Zenith for their European journey — the moment when the decision to travel becomes an irreversible fact and the certainties of American life give way to the uncertainties of the Old World

memes.label: Dodsworth Household
memes.description: The Dodsworth family household in Zenith — the domestic organization that contains Sam, Fran, their children Emily and Brent, and the accumulated tensions of a marriage sustained by accommodation rather than intimacy

memes.label: Edith Cortright
memes.description: An American expatriate living in Venice — the woman who offers Sam Dodsworth the companionship, understanding, and peace that Fran could not

memes.label: Emily Dodsworth
memes.description: The daughter of Sam and Fran Dodsworth, whose transition from tomboy companion to married Zenith matron mirrors the generational shift that leaves Sam feeling obsolete

memes.label: Endicott Everett Atkins
memes.description: An American expatriate in Paris who dominates the social circle that Fran Dodsworth joins, reputed to resemble Henry James in appearance and manner.

memes.label: Ercole Estate
memes.description: The Venetian villa compound where Sam Dodsworth finds peace and companionship with Edith Cortright — the Ercole estate represents the novel's vision of a life built on beauty and mutual recognition rather than ambition

memes.label: Ercole Expatriate Community
memes.description: The small community of expatriates at the Ercole estate near Venice — a society organized around conversation, appreciation, and quiet daily life rather than status or commerce, representing the novel's vision of a life well lived

memes.label: Europe vs America
memes.description: The cultural opposition that structures Dodsworth — Old World tradition, sophistication, and social hierarchy contrasted with American vitality, practicality, and democratic instincts

memes.label: European Aristocracy
memes.description: The European aristocratic class as encountered by the Dodsworths — a social order defined by inheritance rather than achievement, which Fran pursues and Sam regards with wary ambivalence

memes.label: Ford Motor Company
memes.description: The Ford Motor Company appears throughout the novel as the dominant force in American automobile manufacturing — the competitor against which Sam's Revelation Motor Company and every other independent carmaker must measure itself

memes.label: Fran Dodsworth
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's wife of twenty years — intelligent, restless, socially ambitious, and ultimately destructive; the engine of the novel's marital drama and Lewis's anatomy of American cultural insecurity

memes.label: Fran Meets Kurt von Obersdorf
memes.description: Fran Dodsworth's meeting with Kurt von Obersdorf in Berlin — the romantic encounter that crystallizes her pursuit of European aristocracy into a specific relationship and precipitates the novel's marital crisis

memes.label: Friendship and Belonging
memes.description: The search for genuine human connection beyond marriage — Sam's friendships with men and his eventual discovery of companionship with Edith Cortright

memes.label: Henry Hazzard
memes.description: A heart specialist in Zenith and one of Sam Dodsworth's closest friends, host of the weekly poker game that binds Sam's old social circle.

memes.label: Herman Voelker
memes.description: Fran Dodsworth's father — a German-American brewer whose success and ethnicity shape Fran's lifelong ambivalence about her American identity

memes.label: Herr Dr. Biedner
memes.description: A Berlin lawyer, Fran Dodsworth's second cousin, who hosts the dinner party where Fran first meets Kurt von Obersdorf—a meeting that changes the course of the Dodsworths' marriage.

memes.label: Home and Exile
memes.description: The dialectic of home and exile that structures Sam's journey — leaving America, experiencing displacement in Europe, and the question of whether return is possible or even desirable

memes.label: Hurd's London Dinner
memes.description: The dinner at the Dindonneau Restaurant in Soho organized by Hurd, manager of the London Revelation agency — a comic set piece of American expatriate culture, with flags, banners, and the desperate machinery of transplanted patriotism

memes.label: Innocence and Experience
memes.description: The developmental arc of Sam Dodsworth — from American innocence through European experience to hard-won self-knowledge, a midlife Bildungsroman

memes.label: International Society
memes.description: The floating world of international hotels, transatlantic steamers, and European resorts that forms the Dodsworths' social environment — a society defined by mobility, surface, and the performance of cultivation among people who belong nowhere in particular

memes.label: Kennepoose Canoe Club
memes.description: The social club in Zenith where Sam Dodsworth first met Fran — the Kennepoose Canoe Club is the novel's recurring image of Midwestern social life and the origin point of the Dodsworth marriage

memes.label: Kennepoose Canoe Club Dance
memes.description: The August 1903 dance at the Kennepoose Canoe Club where Sam Dodsworth first courts Fran Voelker — the novel's opening scene and the origin point of the Dodsworth marriage

memes.label: Kurt von Obersdorf
memes.description: The Austrian nobleman with whom Fran falls in love — the culmination of her social ambition and the catalyst for the Dodsworths' final estrangement

memes.label: Leisure and Purpose
memes.description: The existential problem of leisure for a man defined by work — Sam Dodsworth's struggle to find purpose when the factory no longer needs him

memes.label: London
memes.description: The Dodsworths' first European destination — London represents the initial shock of the Old World, where Sam confronts his American identity against the backdrop of British tradition

memes.label: Lord Herndon
memes.description: The English aristocrat who hosts the Dodsworths at his country house and delivers the novel's most penetrating analysis of Fran's character — that she is "so typically American" in her belief that she is European

memes.label: Major Clyde Lockert
memes.description: A British adventurer and cocoa planter who befriends the Dodsworths on the transatlantic crossing — the novel's first and most sympathetically drawn European, who serves as Sam's initial guide to the Old World

memes.label: Marriage in Dodsworth
memes.description: The Dodsworths' marriage as the novel's central human relationship — a study of incompatibility, midlife reckoning, and the question of what holds two people together across decades

memes.label: Matey Pearson
memes.description: Tub Pearson's wife — a representative of the Midwestern domestic world that Fran rejects and Sam remembers with affection

memes.label: Meeting Edith Cortright
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's meeting with Edith Cortright at the Ercole estate near Venice — the encounter that becomes the novel's resolution, offering a companionship built on mutual recognition rather than need

memes.label: Midlife Transition
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's passage through fifty — the loss of career, the unraveling of marriage, and the existential question of what a man is worth when his productive years recede

memes.label: Minna von Escher
memes.description: The witty, vital wife of a Berlin violinist; her flirtatious rapport with Sam Dodsworth during the Berlin visit offers a counterpoint to Fran's growing intimacy with Kurt von Obersdorf.

memes.label: Modernity and Industry
memes.description: The automobile age as the defining context of Dodsworth — industrial capitalism, technological progress, and the existential question of what a man is worth when he no longer makes things

memes.label: Montreux
memes.description: The Swiss lakeside town where Fran plans to spend the summer with Renée de Pénable — Montreux is the destination Fran chooses over returning to America with Sam, a place referenced but never reached in the novel

memes.label: Nande Azeredo
memes.description: A South American acquaintance Sam meets in Europe — representing the genuinely international perspective that offers an alternative to both American provincialism and European snobbery

memes.label: Pall Mall
memes.description: The London street of gentlemen's clubs where Sam Dodsworth confronts his American invisibility — Pall Mall is the novel's emblematic image of English exclusivity and transatlantic dislocation

memes.label: Pall Mall Walk
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's solitary walk past the gentlemen's clubs of Pall Mall — the moment when his American invisibility in London becomes most acute, triggering a defensive self-assertion that reveals more than it protects

memes.label: Paris
memes.description: The European city where the Dodsworths' marriage most visibly unravels — Paris represents sophistication, culture, and the social world Fran aspires to join

memes.label: Paris Social Season
memes.description: The Dodsworths' extended stay in Paris — the period when Fran's social ambition reaches its most intense expression and Sam's alienation from his wife becomes permanent

memes.label: Pearson's Bank
memes.description: The Zenith bank owned by Tub Pearson's family, representing the established financial order of Sam Dodsworth's provincial world

memes.label: Prohibition in Dodsworth
memes.description: The Prohibition-era ban on alcohol serves throughout the novel as Lewis's sharpest instrument for satirizing American hypocrisy — a law universally evaded and universally discussed

memes.label: Provincialism and Cosmopolitanism
memes.description: The tension between Zenith's provincial self-satisfaction and Europe's cosmopolitan sophistication — and Lewis's critique of both positions

memes.label: Renée de Pénable
memes.description: A French socialite who represents Parisian sophistication — one of the European women Fran both admires and competes with

memes.label: Revelation Motor Company
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's automobile manufacturing company in Zenith — the Revelation Motor Company is the source of his wealth, his identity, and his eventual liberation when its sale propels him toward Europe

memes.label: Revelation Motor Company (Organization)
memes.description: The automobile manufacturing enterprise Sam Dodsworth founded and led — the Revelation Motor Company as an organization, distinct from its physical building, representing the entrepreneurial achievement that defined his American life

memes.label: Rome
memes.description: The Italian capital where Sam Dodsworth spends a solitary week attempting to study architecture, one of the final stops on his European journey of self-discovery

memes.label: Ross Ireland
memes.description: An American journalist and observer in Europe — a sharp-eyed commentator who offers Sam an alternative model of American engagement with the Old World

memes.label: Sale of the Revelation Company
memes.description: The absorption of Sam Dodsworth's Revelation Motor Company by the Unit Automotive Company — the business transaction that ends his industrial career and propels the Dodsworths toward Europe

memes.label: Sam Buys Five Hats
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's purchase of five hats in a single London afternoon — a small comic episode that captures the American traveler's anxious negotiation with European sophistication, beginning a Europeanization he had not intended to begin

memes.label: Sam Dodsworth
memes.description: The protagonist — a fifty-year-old American automobile manufacturer from Zenith who sells his company and embarks on a European journey that transforms his understanding of himself, his marriage, and his country

memes.label: Sam Alone in Venice
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's solitary period in Venice after the Berlin crisis — the interval during which he discovers that solitude is not punishment but possibility, and that a life organized around attention rather than achievement is available to him

memes.label: Sam Refuses the U.A.C. Vice-Presidency
memes.description: The pivotal moment when Sam Dodsworth declines Alec Kynance's offer of a vice-presidency at the Unit Automotive Company — choosing uncertainty over a gilded cage and setting the novel's central journey in motion

memes.label: Self-Deception
memes.description: Fran Dodsworth's profound capacity for self-deception — the psychological mechanism through which she justifies her pursuit of European status while believing herself motivated by culture and love

memes.label: Social Climbing
memes.description: Fran Dodsworth's relentless pursuit of European aristocratic status — the engine of the novel's marital drama and Lewis's critique of American insecurity before Old World hierarchy

memes.label: SS Ultima
memes.description: The ocean liner that carries the Dodsworths from New York to England — the SS Ultima is the novel's threshold space, suspended between the America they leave and the Europe they seek

memes.label: The American Woman
memes.description: Fran Dodsworth as a representative type of early twentieth-century American womanhood — educated, restless, ambitious, and constrained by the very prosperity that was supposed to free her

memes.label: The Dodsworth Divorce
memes.description: The legal and emotional dissolution of the Dodsworth marriage — the final event in the arc that began at the Kennepoose Canoe Club decades earlier, and the act that liberates both Sam and Fran to pursue the lives they have chosen

memes.label: The Grand Tour
memes.description: The tradition of extended European travel as cultural education — the framework for Sam Dodsworth's journey and a lens through which Lewis examines what travel can and cannot teach

memes.label: The Herndon Set
memes.description: The social circle centered on Lord Herndon — the English aristocratic set that hosts the Dodsworths, diagnoses their marriage, and represents the closed world of inherited privilege that both impresses and excludes the American visitor

memes.label: Tub Pearson
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's Yale roommate and lifelong best friend — a Zenith banker who represents the uncomplicated male friendship and Midwestern loyalty that anchor Sam's American identity

memes.label: Ultima Gala Dance
memes.description: The gala dance aboard the SS Ultima under Japanese lanterns — the event that triggers Sam's memory of the Kennepoose Canoe Club dance where he first met Fran, connecting his present estrangement to his fullest moment of romantic belonging

memes.label: Unit Automotive Company (U.A.C.)
memes.description: "The imperial U.A.C., with its seven makes of motors, its body-building works, its billion dollars of capital" — the industrial giant that absorbs Sam Dodsworth's Revelation Company and precipitates the novel's action

memes.label: Venice
memes.description: The city where Sam Dodsworth finds peace, companionship with Edith Cortright, and the possibility of a new life — Venice represents the novel's quiet resolution

memes.label: Vienna
memes.description: The Austrian capital, ancestral home of Kurt von Obersdorf and symbol of the Old World aristocracy that fascinates and ultimately rejects Fran Dodsworth

memes.label: Winnemac
memes.description: The fictional Midwestern state that contains Zenith — Winnemac is Lewis's invented American geography, the regional identity that shaped Sam Dodsworth and the world he must learn to see from a distance

memes.label: Winnemac University
memes.description: The state university of Lewis's fictional Winnemac — Winnemac University represents Midwestern higher education, the civic pride of the state, and the institutional landscape that forms the novel's American world

memes.label: Work and Identity
memes.description: The role of productive labor in constituting Sam Dodsworth's sense of self — and the crisis that follows when the work is taken away

memes.label: Yale Alumni Network
memes.description: The informal network of Yale graduates that connects Sam Dodsworth to American elite society — the Yale alumni network represents the social capital, enduring loyalties, and unexamined assumptions of the American establishment

memes.label: Yale Reunion
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's return to Yale for his thirtieth reunion — a mid-journey homecoming that offers temporary refuge from European dislocation and a reminder of the American identity he carries within him

memes.label: Yale University
memes.description: Sam Dodsworth's alma mater — Yale represents his social formation, his enduring friendships, and the American elite identity that both sustains and limits him throughout the novel

memes.label: Zenith
memes.description: The fictional Midwestern city — Sam Dodsworth's hometown, the seat of his industrial success, and the provincial world that Fran is determined to escape

memes.label: Zenith Chamber of Commerce
memes.description: The civic business organization of Lewis's Zenith — the Chamber of Commerce embodies the booster spirit, institutional optimism, and commercial energy of Midwestern American life

memes.label: Zenith Civic Clubs
memes.description: The constellation of fraternal and civic organizations in Zenith — Rotary, Kiwanis, Elks, Oddfellows, Moose, Woodmen — that constitute the social infrastructure of Midwestern commercial life, whose banners follow Americans even to London

memes.label: Zenith Locomotive Works
memes.description: The Zenith factory where Sam Dodsworth worked before founding the Revelation Company — the Locomotive Works represents the industrial world that formed him, "that most noisy and unsentimental institution" that shaped his character
